title: I C E  C R E A M 🍧

items.name: Nyhet! Häagen Dazs Vanilla
items.description: This rich and creamy ice cream is infused with natural vanilla flavouring from Madagascan vanilla beans, ensuring an indulgent dessert experience without artificial flavours or colours. 460ml

items.name: Häagen Dazs Salted Caramel
items.description: A deluxe harmony of sweet and salty, crafted for true dessert lovers. This decadent pint features velvety caramel ice cream swirled with rich rivers of salted butter caramel sauce and finished with salted caramel pieces.  Without artificial flavours or colours. 460ml.
